name: MDNE
short_description: MDNE - The game about your nightmare dream.
detailed_description:
MDNE - My Dream Never End!


You find yourself in your nightmare once again, but this time you will discover once and for all what causes it.

In this nightmare, all your frightening dreams, childhood memories, fears, ancient Greek mythology, and your own unique and strongest fear are intertwined.
To help make sense of it all, your inner voice will guide you, vividly remembering all your past nightmares.
And at the end of the game, a final battle awaits you.

This is a first-person mystical horror novel with standard controls: keyboard and mouse.

You will plunge into a dream world in which you need to solve puzzles, run away from monsters and discover the history of your nightmares.
Warning: some strong language.

Game Features:

  • Simple and pleasant controls.
  • The atmosphere of mystical dream.
  • Good optimization.
  • Interesting novel storyline.
  • Hand-drawn graphics.
  • There are achievements and cloud saving.
  • Three endings.
